name: subagent-knowledge-bridge
description: Knowledge-engineering MCP bridge — 55 tools across engineering/blog/support/llms/vendor lanes plus vendor_cache_stats.
long_description: One-click local install of this repo's MCP bridge (src/mcp/bridge-server.ts). Pairs with the official github-mcp-server connector (see README) to give an Apple/Desktop client the same GitHub + vendor-docs surface this cloud session uses. OAuth-only: no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY anywhere.

database_url.title: Postgres URL (optional)
database_url.description: AlloyDB/Postgres connection string for the warehouse-backed lanes (dim_/fact_/events_ + vendor_cache_stats). Leave blank to run docs-only.

redis_url.title: Redis URL (optional)
redis_url.description: L2 cache. Leave blank to skip tiered-cache warming.
